extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon won stage with 19km attack on Col d'Èze, ROGLIČ Primož defended yellow by 9 seconds using VAN AERT Wout's pacing.
tactical_patterns: MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe punctured descending after penultimate climb sprint, eliminating GC threat at 46km to go.
YATES Simon gained 10-second bonus at penultimate sprint before Col d'Èze attack, critical for near-GC reversal.
VAN AERT Wout alone stabilized ROGLIČ's deficit at 20 seconds on descent, proving two-man advantage nullifies solo climber.
QUINTANA Nairo attacked first on Col d'Èze then cracked, suggesting early move reconnaissance before YATES counter.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: overcame psychological barrier of final-day collapses in French stage races, held 29-second margin despite isolation.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: first win since May 2021 Giro, timed Col d'Èze attack perfectly to nearly overturn 44-second deficit.
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: negative: mechanical at worst moment descending with 46km remaining destroyed podium position from breakaway.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: single teammate pacing on descent sufficient to protect 9-second GC margin against solo attacker.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: attacked Col d'Èze first but cracked immediately, signaling poor condition despite positioning.
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: negative: mechanical early caused permanent elimination from front group before decisive selection.
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: negative: dropped before penultimate climb while ROGLIČ still had VAN AERT, exposing team weakness.
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: lost contact with ROGLIČ group before final climbs alongside DENNIS, failed protection role.
